title: CapabilityTranslations
description: Sidecar translation file. One file per (locale, L1) under `catalogue/i18n/<locale>/L1-*.yaml`. Mirrors the source L1 filename so per-L1 CODEOWNERS still apply. Only translatable display fields appear here; identifiers, levels, industry tags, references, and lifecycle metadata stay locale-neutral in `catalogue/L1-*.yaml`.

locale.description: BCP-47 language tag (e.g. 'fr', 'fr-CA', 'zh-Hans', 'pt-BR'). Must equal the parent directory name under catalogue/i18n/.

source.description: Filename of the source L1 file this translates (e.g. 'L1-actuarial-management.yaml'). Lint enforces existence.

entries.description: Map of capability id -> translated display fields. Every key must resolve to a node in the source L1 tree.

metadata.description: Translator credits, review status, completion notes. Not consumed by build.

LocalizedFields.description: Translatable fields for one capability node. All optional — omit a field to fall back to the source language for that field only.

name.description: Localised display name. Same noun-phrase, Title Case rules as the source name (per business-capability-governance-model.md §5).

aliases.description: Localised aliases. Independent from the source `aliases` list.
